creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Tag your foodie besties! 🥰

@blacktapdubai is a popular joint serving creative craft burgers and gravity-defying milkshakes! There are several outlets in Dubai. We dined in the cool and funky branch @malloftheemirates.

What to expect:
• Great variety of craft burgers. Our faves so far are Pear Bacon Jam (64 AED) and The Truffle Burger (90 AED) which is shown in this reel. 
• American comfort food like wings, cheesy fries, and salads. Take note, HUGE serving sizes! 
• CrazyShake, which is literally crazy! We had The Cake Shake (62 AED) - a drink+dessert fusion. Good enough for 2 people to share.
• Warm and friendly staff! They’re all smiles and chatty.
